name: long sloping grey corridor
description: I'm in a long sloping grey corridor
hints: This is the main hub of the base with six exits. Explore all directions.
Color-coded hallways branch from here: white (UP), blue (N), yellow (DOWN). Each leads to secured areas.
UP leads to the white hallway, DOWN to the yellow hallway, NORTH to the blue hallway. SOUTH has the chair room. WEST has maintenance.
Explore all branches: UP/white for visitor area, N/blue for security area, DOWN/yellow for maintenance area. SOUTH for the ID chair. WEST for supplies.
notes: Central hub corridor connecting all areas of the base. Six exits: N to blue hallway (room 8), S to grey/chair room (room 4), E to briefing (room 2), W to maintenance (room 12), U to white hallway (room 6), D to yellow hallway (room 7).
